file_insights.changes_made: Implemented transient failure retry logic after run_card completes

key_modifications.change: Added is_transient_retry boolean flag to track network failures eligible for retry
key_modifications.purpose: Determine if card should be sent back to pending/ for retry

key_modifications.change: Added transient failure detection and retry logic block
key_modifications.logic: Checks is_network_failure(failure_reason) AND retry_count < max_retries, increments retry_count, logs retry attempt

key_modifications.change: Combined condition: is_rate_limited || is_transient_retry to send cards to pending/
key_modifications.purpose: Ensures transient failures are retried instead of immediately failing

key_modifications.change: Records transition to pending for transient retries with proper lineage event logging
key_modifications.purpose: Maintains audit trail for retry attempts

patterns_discovered.pattern: Reuse of existing failure handling pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Transient failure retry logic follows the exact same pattern as rate-limited failure handling (lines 456-460), enabling consistent behavior across failure types
patterns_discovered.benefit: Code consistency and reduced cognitive load for maintenance

patterns_discovered.description: Uses saturating_add(1) to increment retry_count with max_retries (3) as upper bound, preventing infinite retry loops
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents runaway retries while gracefully handling failures

patterns_discovered.description: Both rate-limited and transient failures move to pending/ using combined condition, avoiding duplicate state transition code
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single source of truth for retry state transitions

patterns_discovered.description: Leverages is_network_failure() from subtask-3-1 for pattern matching, centralizing network error detection logic
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintainable and testable network error patterns in one place

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor retry behavior in production to validate 3-retry limit is appropriate for typical transient failures
recommendations.rationale: Current limit of 3 retries is hardcoded; may need adjustment based on real-world failure patterns

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding exponential backoff between retries instead of immediate requeue to pending/
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation moves card back to pending/ immediately; network congestion may benefit from progressive delays (30s, 60s, 120s)

recommendations.recommendation: Add metric tracking for retry_count exhaustion to identify systematic network issues
recommendations.rationale: Would help distinguish between transient blips and persistent connectivity problems

recommendations.recommendation: Document retry behavior in user-facing logs when moving to Phase 4 (connectivity probes)
recommendations.rationale: Users may see cards moving between pending/running unexpectedly; clear logging helps with debugging
